title: Fed signals first rate cut could come sooner than expected
summary: Federal Reserve officials suggested inflation is cooling enough for markets to expect earlier rate cuts.

title: US CPI comes in below expectations, easing inflation concerns
summary: A softer-than-expected CPI reading strengthened hopes for lower interest rates and supported growth assets.

title: US 10-year Treasury yield falls as bond market prices in policy easing
summary: Treasury yields declined after weaker inflation data, helping long-duration assets and boosting sentiment toward technology shares.

title: AI server demand remains strong across hyperscalers
summary: Cloud providers continued to signal strong capex demand for AI servers, GPUs and networking hardware.

title: Memory pricing outlook improves on AI demand
summary: Improving memory pricing and AI-related demand supported expectations for better fundamentals in the memory supply chain.

title: Travel demand strengthens into peak booking season
summary: Travel operators reported resilient booking trends and improving leisure demand heading into the holiday period.

title: Risk appetite improves as volatility cools
summary: A calmer volatility backdrop improved appetite for growth stocks and higher-beta technology names.

title: Microsoft expands AI cloud monetization roadmap
summary: Microsoft highlighted broader monetization opportunities tied to Copilot and Azure AI services.

title: Oracle signs additional AI infrastructure customers
summary: Oracle continued to benefit from enterprise demand for AI infrastructure and cloud capacity.

title: Regeneron posts encouraging pipeline update and raises long-term confidence
summary: Regeneron reported positive pipeline progress and strengthened investor confidence in its medium-term growth outlook.

title: UnitedHealth faces policy scrutiny in Washington
summary: Policy-related scrutiny created a more cautious near-term outlook for managed care names.
